title: astragalus luteolus
intro: Astragalus luteolus, also known as yellow milk vetch, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus luteolus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
